## Safety Boundary

- [ ] Public claims still say exact rollback is limited to covered local file changes.
- [ ] External systems are framed as compensation/manual-review, not exact rollback.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private run artifacts, or real external-service payloads are committed.
- [ ] README/docs/tests are updated when commands, artifacts, or release boundaries changed.
